user_query: I want to get better at playing piano. Add a new learning project called 'Piano Practice' and add a task to practice scales for 30 minutes every day.

fields.name: Piano Practice
fields.description: Learning project to improve piano skills. Add a recurring task: "Practice scales — 30 minutes daily" (status: Todo, priority: Medium, due_date: null). Focus on major and minor scales, hands separately then together, and gradually increase tempo.

result.reasoning: Creating a new learning project under Skill Acquisition to capture the user's goal. Appending at end since no specific position was requested. The description includes the requested task details so the project immediately contains the daily 30-minute scales practice instruction.
